doc.field: Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)
Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)
Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)

Decrès, Denis (Minister of the Navy) : copy of a letter forwarded to him, the original of which was written and signed by Jan Willem Jannsens, governor-general of Java, aboard the frigate "Méduse," raising complaints about the commander of French artillery on Java (1 leaf, ALS)

Decrès, Denis (Minister of the Navy) : copy of a letter forwarded to him, the original of which was written and signed by Jan Willem Jannsens, governor-general of Java, aboard the frigate "Méduse," raising complaints about the commander of French artillery on Java (1 leaf, ALS)

Decrès, Denis (Minister of the Navy) : copy of a letter forwarded to him, the original of which was written and signed by Jan Willem Jannsens, governor-general of Java, aboard the frigate "Méduse," raising complaints about the commander of French artillery on Java (1 leaf, ALS)

Decrès, Denis (Minister of the Navy) : copy of a letter forwarded to him, the original of which was written and signed by Jan Willem Jannsens, governor-general of Java, aboard the frigate "Méduse," raising complaints about the commander of French artillery on Java (1 leaf, ALS)
